title: Carnival Corporation & plc 2025 Annual Report
note: Primary source for business description, brands, revenue, net income, EPS, customer deposits, and cruise revenue structure.

title: Our Cruise Lines
note: Official brand portfolio page describing Carnival Cruise Line, Princess Cruises, and other Carnival cruise brands.

title: About Us
note: Official Carnival Cruise Line page describing the brand, fleet, homeports, destinations, and parent-company relationship.

title: Market capitalization of Carnival Corporation (CCL)
note: Market capitalization, share price, market rank, and market-cap history used for the refreshed market-cap metric.

title: OpenTripPlanner
note: Open-source multimodal trip-planning project used as an enabling primitive for independent travel coordination.

title: OpenTripPlanner GitHub repository
note: Public source repository supporting the openness assessment for OpenTripPlanner.

title: OpenStreetMap
note: Open map data primitive for destination discovery, port mapping, routing, and federated travel services.

title: Open Food Network
note: Open-source marketplace precedent for local producer coordination and transparent direct booking models.

title: CoopCycle
note: Federated cooperative platform precedent for worker-owned local service coordination.
